contract.promotion_requirement: fixed-direct and loss-direct heldout continuations must both hit before pair-probe promotion
contract.leakage_policy: train exact direct completions and balanced prefixes, but keep exact heldout prompts and pair probe out of training rows
contract.source_route_boundary: created after direct-prompt bridge patch had zero hit improvement and introduced fixed pollution
contract.patch_note: adds surrogate pair-transfer rows while preserving exact heldout pair prompt isolation

added_rows: pair_transfer pipe surrogate fixed | loss => fixed loss

pair_transfer comma surrogate fixed, loss => fixed loss

patch.patch_focus: non-heldout pair prompt transfer rows that bind fixed and loss together

check_rows.detail: patch follows only a ready pair prompt transfer repair plan
repair plan must request this patch artifact
base must be the direct-completion surface contract
all pair-transfer patch rows must be present
patch should add a meaningful set of transfer rows
direct completion rows must be preserved
heldout pair prompt must stay out of training rows
patch rows must not train on exact heldout pair prompt
exact eval prompts must not be training rows

interpretation.reason: The patched contract adds surrogate pair-transfer rows while keeping the exact heldout pair prompt isolated.
interpretation.next_action: materialize the pair-transfer patched contract and rerun training plus pair-probe replay
